mapper.select: SELECT row_id, order_id, vehicle_type, sequence, part_id, order_date, order_status FROM orders ORDER BY row_id ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN UPPER(order_status) = 'PENDING' THEN order_id END) AS pending_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN UPPER(order_status) = 'COMPLETED' THEN order_id END) AS completed_orders FROM orders
SELECT vehicle_type, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count, 0 AS ratio FROM orders GROUP BY vehicle_type ORDER BY vehicle_type ASC

SELECT t.order_id, t.vehicle_type, t.engine, t.drive, t.tire, t.seat, t.`option`, t.order_date, t.order_status
ORDER BY t.order_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT DISTINCT vehicle_type FROM orders WHERE vehicle_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY vehicle_type ASC
SELECT DISTINCT part_id FROM orders WHERE sequence = #{sequence} AND part_id IS NOT NULL AND part_id <> 'NULL' ORDER BY part_id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT part_id FROM orders WHERE sequence = 'OPTION' AND part_id IS NOT NULL AND part_id <> 'NULL' ORDER BY part_id ASC
